heading: Definitions
label: 7142d Definitions
notes: References in TextSections 7142a to 7142d of this title, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning § 1(a)(4) [div. B, title IV] of , which enacted sections 7142a to 7142d of this title, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 106–554

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Miscellaneous Appropriations Act, 2001, and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2001, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Museum
children.label: 1 Museum
children.text: The term “Museum” means the museum operated by the Secretary of Energy and located at 300 South Tulane Avenue in Oak Ridge, Tennessee.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy or a designated representative of the Secretary.
